name: GreenSilk Textile Technology Co., Ltd.
description: Specializing in organic cotton and recycled fiber fabric R&D and production, holding GOTS, OEKO-TEX Standard 100 and other international certifications. Annual capacity exceeds 20 million meters, with products exported to Europe, Americas and Southeast Asia.
address: No. 88 Green Avenue, Textile Industrial Park, Xiaoshan District, Hangzhou

name: BioSource Eco-Fiber Co., Ltd.
description: A leading recycled polyester fiber producer in China, recycling over 500 million PET bottles annually and converting them into high-quality recycled polyester staple and filament. GRS certified, products widely used in sportswear and home textiles.
address: No. 18, Eco-Tech Industrial Park, Wujiang District, Suzhou

name: Natural Dyeing Technology Co., Ltd.
description: Dedicated to natural plant dye development and application, holding multiple patents in plant dyeing technology. Uses zero-discharge dyeing processes to significantly reduce water consumption. Products cover apparel fabrics and home textiles.
address: Building A, Green Manufacturing Base, Panyu District, Guangzhou

name: Bamboo Harmony Textile Co., Ltd.
description: Professional bamboo fiber and bamboo charcoal fiber fabric producer, combining traditional bamboo resources with modern textile technology. Bamboo fiber fabrics are naturally antibacterial, breathable and moisture-wicking.
address: No. 66, Bamboo Road, Textile City, Keqiao District, Shaoxing

name: Bangkok Green Garments Co., Ltd.
description: Thailand's leading green garment manufacturer using solar-powered production lines to achieve carbon-neutral manufacturing. Serving globally renowned brands, specializing in sustainable sportswear and casual apparel production.

name: Circular Textile Technology Co., Ltd.
description: Focused on textile waste recycling technology R&D, developing closed-loop recycling systems from used garments to new fibers. Committed to building circular economy models in the textile industry.
address: No. 12, Circular Economy Industrial Park, Tongzhou District, Nantong

name: Vietnam EcoWeave Joint Stock Company
description: Vietnam's leading eco-textile company, focusing on full-chain production of organic cotton garments and sustainable fashion products. Factories equipped with wastewater treatment systems and rainwater harvesting facilities.
address: Ho Chi Minh City, Binh Duong Industrial Zone

name: SeaSilk New Materials Co., Ltd.
description: Innovative company transforming ocean waste into high-performance fiber materials, converting discarded fishing nets and marine plastics into premium fibers. Products awarded multiple environmental innovation prizes.
address: Building B, Ocean Tech Park, Huangdao District, Qingdao

name: India Organic Cotton Collective
description: India's largest organic cotton growing and spinning cooperative, uniting over 5,000 cotton farmers to promote organic farming techniques. Full chain organic certification from cotton growing to yarn production ensures product traceability.

name: BluCarbon Accessories Technology Co., Ltd.
description: Specializing in eco-friendly textile accessories R&D and production, including recycled buttons, bio-based zippers, and biodegradable packaging. Helping fashion brands achieve full product line green transformation, serving 200+ domestic and international brands.
address: No. 10, New Materials Industrial Base, Yinzhou District, Ningbo

name: Korea Smart Textile Institute
description: Korean smart eco-textile research institute, focused on functional eco-fabric R&D. Core technologies include graphene composite fiber, phase-change temperature regulation materials, and photocatalytic self-cleaning fabrics.

name: Oasis Nonwoven Co., Ltd.
description: South China's largest eco nonwoven fabric producer, specializing in spunlace, spunbond and meltblown nonwovens. Using bio-based materials and low-carbon production processes, products widely used in medical, filtration, and agricultural applications.
address: No. 1, Oasis Road, Chendai Town Industrial Zone, Jinjiang City, Quanzhou

name: Japan Sustainable Fiber Alliance
description: Japanese Sustainable Fiber Alliance, assembling eco-technologies from Japan's top fiber companies. Core products include TENCEL™ collaborative series, biodegradable polyester and plant-based synthetic fibers, representing Asia's highest fiber technology standards.

name: GreenTest Certification Co., Ltd.
description: Professional third-party organization for textile environmental testing and certification services. Provides testing and consulting for international certifications including OEKO-TEX, GOTS, and GRS, helping enterprises strengthen compliance capabilities.
address: Building 3, Testing & Certification Park, Xinbei District, Changzhou

name: Indonesia EcoTex Group
description: Indonesia's largest integrated green textile group, covering fiber production, weaving, dyeing & finishing and garment manufacturing. Factory achieved full Higg FEM score, listed as preferred supplier by multiple international brands. Annual revenue exceeds $200 million.
address: Jakarta, Tangerang Industrial Zone, Block A1
